questions.question: How long does a smile makeover take?
questions.answer: The duration varies depending on the procedures included. Simple makeovers can be completed in 2-3 visits, while comprehensive transformations may take 3-6 months.

questions.question: Is the process painful?
questions.answer: We prioritize your comfort and use modern techniques and anesthesia to ensure minimal discomfort during all procedures.

questions.question: How long do results last?
questions.answer: With proper care and maintenance, smile makeover results can last 10-15 years or longer. Regular dental check-ups help maintain longevity.

questions.question: Can I see how I'll look before starting?
questions.answer: Yes, we use digital smile design technology to show you a preview of your expected results before beginning treatment.
